title: Financial Institutions Embrace Prediction Markets Amid Regulatory Debate
summary: Despite ongoing legal battles, financial institutions are increasingly adopting prediction markets.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the growing acceptance of prediction markets despite regulatory uncertainty, signaling potential market maturation.

title: Crypto Firms Blame Downsizing on AI Advancements
summary: Gemini and Crypto.com cite AI as a reason for downsizing, while some abandon crypto for AI's higher profits.
charlotte_impact: Illustrates AI's disruptive impact on the crypto industry, potentially leading to further shifts in resource allocation.

title: Kalshi Defends Prediction Market Model Amid Gambling Concerns

title: Oil Surges, Stocks Drop Amid Economic Stagnation Fears

title: $25 Million Crypto Stablecoin Exploit Compromises Resolv Labs
